support_need: Low to moderate support with organizational systems
therapy_history: Occupational Therapy (2 years), Behavioral Counseling (1 year)
school_accommodation: Fidget tools, frequent movement breaks, visual timers, checklist for lockers, and chunked assignments
recommended_services: Occupational Therapy (30 min/week), Academic Resource Support (60 min/week)
notes: Goals address Category 1 (Adaptive/Independent Living - Time management and school material organization) and Category 5 (Social/Behavior - Self-monitoring of focus and impulsivity control during transitions).

support_need: High support for community and vocational transition
therapy_history: Occupational Therapy (8 years), Speech-Language Therapy (6 years)
school_accommodation: Task-analyzed checklists, hands-on demonstration, repeated practice, and community-based instruction support
recommended_services: Transition/Vocational Services (180 min/week), Occupational Therapy (30 min/month consult)
notes: Focusing heavily on Category 1 (Adaptive/Independent Living - Safe navigation of public transit, making small purchases at local stores) and Category 4 (Math - Functional cash handling and counting money).

therapy_history: None
school_accommodation: Use of calculator, math manipulatives, grid paper for aligning numbers, and reduced number of problems on a page
recommended_services: Special Education Math Resource (150 min/week)
notes: Prioritizing Category 4 (Math - Operations & algebraic thinking, mastering place value, and learning foundational counting/cardinality using physical visual indicators).

support_need: High support in communication and pragmatics
therapy_history: Speech-Language Therapy (7 years), ABA Therapy (3 years)
school_accommodation: Augmentative and Alternative Communication (AAC) device access at all times, visual schedule, structured socialization protocols, and sensory room access
recommended_services: Speech-Language Therapy (90 min/week), Assistive Technology Consultation (monthly)
notes: Focusing on Category 2 (Communication - Using AAC device to formulate 3-4 word sentences for wants/needs, and taking turns in small groups) and Category 1 (Adaptive/Independent Living - Personal hygiene and weather-appropriate dressing).

therapy_history: Psychotherapy (2 years), Play Therapy (1 year)
school_accommodation: De-escalation plan, sensory corner access, designated safe adult to check-in with, and simplified rule lists with visual reminders
recommended_services: School Social Work (60 min/week), Behavior Interventionist Support (daily check-ins)
notes: Key areas are Category 5 (Social/Behavior - De-escalation protocols, identifying emotional triggers, and safe coping mechanisms during intense frustration) and Category 2 (Communication - Expressing physical and emotional needs calmly).

support_need: Moderate communication and receptive language support
therapy_history: Speech-Language Therapy (4 years)
school_accommodation: Pre-taught vocabulary, graphic organizers for language processing, oral responses accepted for written assignments, and visual guides
recommended_services: Speech-Language Therapy (60 min/week), Special Education Language Arts Resource (90 min/week)
notes: Student is targeting Category 2 (Communication - Receptive understanding of multi-step verbal tasks) and Category 3 (ELA - Building complex sentences and identifying main arguments in grade-level informational texts).

therapy_history: None
school_accommodation: Audiobooks, speech-to-text software, spell-check tools, and testing in a quiet environment with double time
recommended_services: Special Education ELA Resource (120 min/week)
notes: Targets center on Category 3 (ELA - Decoding multisyllabic words, structural analysis, organizing written multi-paragraph argumentative essays with clear thesis statements, and researching sources).

therapy_history: Physical Therapy (2 years), Occupational Therapy (1 year)
school_accommodation: Specialized seating, physical prompts, adapted writing/cutting tools, and hand-under-hand assistance
recommended_services: Physical Therapy (60 min/week), Occupational Therapy (45 min/week)
notes: Prioritizing Category 1 (Adaptive/Independent Living - Gross motor skills like balance, coordination during active play, and learning early shoe-tying/buttoning skills) and Category 4 (Math - Early counting and shape classification).

support_need: Low but requires medical monitoring and processing time support
therapy_history: Occupational Therapy (1 year, discontinued)
school_accommodation: Seizure action plan on file, extra rest time post-seizure, extended deadlines, and reduced screen exposure during computerized testing
recommended_services: School Nurse consultation, Special Education Consultative Services (30 min/month)
notes: Academically stable, focusing on Category 1 (Adaptive/Independent Living - High safety awareness of medical triggers and expressing needs during fatigue) and Category 3 (ELA - Synthesizing reading passages).

support_need: Moderate social and independent living support
therapy_history: Speech-Language Therapy (5 years), Occupational Therapy (3 years)
school_accommodation: Visual career checklists, pre-scheduled transition breaks, guided peer-to-peer job practice, and sensory-friendly workspaces
recommended_services: Transition Specialist (150 min/week), Social Skills Group (45 min/week)
notes: Goals address Category 1 (Adaptive/Independent Living - Daily household management including cleaning tasks and utilizing basic appliances) and Category 2 (Communication - Professional pragmatic interactions with coworkers).

therapy_history: Speech Therapy (4 years), Physical Therapy (3 years), Occupational Therapy (4 years)
school_accommodation: Modified grade level curriculum, visual schedules, 1:1 aide during classroom transition times, and task-analyzed instruction
recommended_services: Speech Therapy (60 min/week), Occupational Therapy (45 min/week), Special Ed Services (240 min/week)
notes: Key developmental areas are Category 1 (Adaptive/Independent Living - Personal hygiene and dressing independently) and Category 2 (Communication - Expressive vocabulary expansion using picture card exchanges).

therapy_history: Individual Counseling (2 years), Family Therapy (1 year)
school_accommodation: Behavior contract, pre-identified cool-down area, non-verbal cues for redirection, and choices provided for assignment format
recommended_services: School Social Work (45 min/week), Behavior Specialist Support (daily tracking)
notes: Goals center on Category 5 (Social/Behavior - Following adult rules/routines and responding safely to correction) and Category 2 (Communication - Directing requests calmly without defensive language).

therapy_history: Occupational Therapy (2 years)
school_accommodation: Speech-to-text software, pencil grips, occupational therapy slant board, and reduced written work copying
recommended_services: Occupational Therapy (30 min/week), Resource Writing Instruction (60 min/week)
notes: Addressing developmental tasks in Category 3 (ELA - Paragraph organization and composing structured sentences) and Category 1 (Adaptive/Independent Living - Fine motor skills required for daily tasks like buttoning and tying).

support_need: Moderate to high academic and daily life support
therapy_history: Occupational Therapy (4 years), Speech Therapy (3 years)
school_accommodation: Simplified language instruction, extended testing, hands-on visual modeling, and calculator options for all operations
recommended_services: Special Education Life Skills Program (180 min/week), Speech-Language Therapy (30 min/week)
notes: Focused on Category 4 (Math - Solving simple practical operations and measurement for baking) and Category 1 (Adaptive/Independent Living - Learning cooking safety guidelines and appliance usage).

therapy_history: Speech Therapy (3 years), ABA Therapy (2 years)
school_accommodation: Visual behavior chart, scheduled visual timers, choice-making boards, and access to noise-canceling headphones
recommended_services: Special Education Resource (120 min/week), Speech-Language Therapy (45 min/week)
notes: Working actively on Category 5 (Social/Behavior - Managing rapid classroom transitions without behavioral outbursts) and Category 2 (Communication - Receptive following of multi-step spoken schedules).

support_need: Low support; relies on executive functioning tracking
therapy_history: School counseling (1 year)
school_accommodation: Self-monitoring trackers, frequent checks for understanding, testing in minimal distraction rooms, and calendar planning support
recommended_services: Academic Coaching / Resource Support (45 min/week)
notes: Targeting Category 1 (Adaptive/Independent Living - Weekly planners and tracking school assignments) and Category 3 (ELA - Essay construction and identifying research methodologies).

therapy_history: Speech-Language Therapy (5 years), Auditory Training (2 years)
school_accommodation: FM system, closed captioning on all digital media, visual seating, and printed notes provided in advance
recommended_services: Teacher of the Deaf and Hard of Hearing (60 min/week), Speech-Language Therapy (45 min/week)
notes: Goals focus on Category 2 (Communication - Requesting spoken clarity or repetitions from peers/teachers) and Category 3 (ELA - Enhancing vocabulary and text comprehension cues).

support_need: Very high support for communication and basic daily living
therapy_history: Physical Therapy (10 years), Occupational Therapy (10 years), Speech-Language Therapy (8 years)
school_accommodation: 1:1 physical support, sensory adjustments, adaptive high-contrast communication display, and customized meal routines
recommended_services: Occupational Therapy (60 min/week), Physical Therapy (60 min/week), Speech-Language Therapy (45 min/week)
notes: Focused extensively on Category 1 (Adaptive/Independent Living - Basic physical mobility and safety awareness hazards) and Category 2 (Communication - Expressing physical distress/desires using switches and sensory-based AAC).

therapy_history: Speech Therapy (1.5 years)
school_accommodation: Wait-time of 10 seconds for speaking, articulation visual cue cards, and peer communication modeling
recommended_services: Speech-Language Therapy (45 min/week)
notes: Prioritizing Category 2 (Communication - Speech intelligibility, phoneme sound production in sentences) and Category 3 (ELA - Word phonetic decoding and sounding out unfamiliar multisyllabic terms).

therapy_history: Reading intervention (1 year)
school_accommodation: Text-to-speech tools, pre-highlighted key text, graphic organizers, and simplified vocabulary definitions
recommended_services: Special Education ELA Resource (150 min/week)
notes: Working under Category 3 (ELA - Summarizing informational content, understanding figurative language constructs, and analyzing text-based evidence).

therapy_history: Behavioral counseling (2 years)
school_accommodation: Pass for counseling office, modified schedule options, alternative testing space, and written behavior rubrics
recommended_services: School Counseling (45 min/week), Behavioral Specialist check-ins
notes: Emphasizing Category 5 (Social/Behavior - Conflict resolution protocols, peer communication, and managing immediate frustration during difficult assessments).

therapy_history: Occupational Therapy (1 year), Speech-Language Therapy (1.5 years)
school_accommodation: Highly structured visual schedule, frequent play-based sensory integration, and visual routine task-analyses
recommended_services: Speech-Language Therapy (45 min/week), Occupational Therapy (30 min/week), Early Intervention Special Ed (180 min/week)
notes: Focused on Category 5 (Social/Behavior - Basic turn-taking, parallel play with peers) and Category 1 (Adaptive/Independent Living - Early personal care tasks including potty training and hand-washing).

therapy_history: Occupational Therapy (2 years)
school_accommodation: Motor-tic allowance without penalty, safe quiet break space, oral presentation options, and sensory input activities
recommended_services: Occupational Therapy Consult (15 min/month)
notes: Goals address Category 5 (Social/Behavior - Educating peers, self-advocacy regarding physical tic needs) and Category 3 (ELA - Presenting ideas clearly using purposeful speaking gestures).

therapy_history: Occupational Therapy (6 years), Speech Therapy (5 years)
school_accommodation: Pictorial instructions, functional skill checklists, and extended time during real-world tasks
recommended_services: Transition Services (240 min/week), Speech-Language Therapy (30 min/week)
notes: Centering targets on Category 1 (Adaptive/Independent Living - Preparing simple meals following visual safety steps, laundry folding/sorting) and Category 4 (Math - Calculating transactions using the 'Next Dollar Up' method).

therapy_history: Occupational Therapy (3 years), Speech Therapy (4 years)
school_accommodation: Hands-on learning, pictorial guides, simplified reading level books, and frequent direct task redirection
recommended_services: Special Education Life Skills (150 min/week), Occupational Therapy (30 min/week)
notes: Key developmental areas include Category 1 (Adaptive/Independent Living - Kitchen safety, handling utensils safely) and Category 4 (Math - Counting items up to 20, basic geometric shape naming).

therapy_history: None
school_accommodation: Graphic organizers, typing options, spelling aids, draft reviews, and extended essay submission deadlines
recommended_services: Special Education ELA Resource (90 min/week)
notes: Key goals align with Category 3 (ELA - Formulating well-organized, paragraph-structured arguments with clear thesis statements, and editing drafts for cohesive sentences).

support_need: Low to moderate sensory and behavioral support
therapy_history: Occupational Therapy (1 year), Speech-Language Therapy (2 years)
school_accommodation: Noise-canceling headphones, access to sensory swing, designated seating near exit, and daily behavioral check-ins
recommended_services: Social Skills Group (30 min/week), Occupational Therapy (30 min/week)
notes: Goals relate to Category 5 (Social/Behavior - Following school rules during recess, keeping personal space) and Category 2 (Communication - Engaging in conversational turn-taking).

therapy_history: Cognitive Rehab Therapy (2 years), Physical Therapy (2 years), Speech Therapy (3 years)
school_accommodation: Step-by-step visual cognitive maps, smart device reminder integration, physical fatigue breaks, and audio-recorded instructions
recommended_services: Transition Services (120 min/week), Assistive Tech Consultation (monthly)

therapy_history: None
school_accommodation: Visual reference sheets for formulas, graph paper for alignments, structured math apps, and extended testing
recommended_services: Special Education Math Resource (120 min/week)
notes: Working actively on Category 4 (Math - Expressions & equations, classifying shapes, analyzing simple measurement data charts).

therapy_history: Physical Therapy (5 years), Occupational Therapy (4 years)

recommended_services: Physical Therapy (60 min/week), Occupational Therapy (45 min/week)

therapy_history: Speech Therapy (4 years), Social Skills training (2 years)

recommended_services: Transition Specialist (90 min/week), Speech-Language Therapy (30 min/week)

therapy_history: Speech-Language Therapy (3 years)
school_accommodation: Phonic visual mats, oral modeling, peer pairing during reading, and small group instructions
recommended_services: Speech-Language Therapy (90 min/week)
notes: Addressing Category 2 (Communication - Vocabulary building, clear sentence structures) and Category 3 (ELA - Phonics, decoding multisyllabic terms, early reading comprehension).

therapy_history: Private counseling (2 years)
school_accommodation: Testing in a separate quiet space, emotional 'cool-off' pass, early class exit to avoid hallway crowd sensory issues, and daily planner oversight
recommended_services: School Counseling (45 min/week)
notes: Focused on Category 5 (Social/Behavior - Recognizing anxiety markers, practicing breathing techniques) and Category 2 (Communication - Pragmatics, asking questions directly to teachers).

therapy_history: Occupational Therapy (8 years), Vocational Prep (2 years)

recommended_services: Transition Services (180 min/week), Occupational Therapy (30 min/week)

support_need: Moderate task organization and processing support

recommended_services: Resource Room Academic Support (90 min/week)
notes: Targets Category 3 (ELA - Following multi-step written directions, writing complete sentences) and Category 5 (Social/Behavior - Rule compliance and managing transitions).

therapy_history: Academic tutoring (2 years)

recommended_services: Special Education Resource ELA (120 min/week)
notes: Goals address Category 3 (ELA - Literacy evaluation, citing specific evidence, understanding figurative terms, and identifying core theme arguments).

support_need: Moderate conversational and peer group support

recommended_services: Speech-Language Therapy (45 min/week), Social Skills Support (45 min/week)

therapy_history: Early Intervention Speech (1 year)

recommended_services: Speech-Language Therapy (60 min/week)
notes: Addressing Category 2 (Communication - Receptive word understanding, expressing feelings/wants using simple verbal sounds or cards).

therapy_history: Individual behavioral therapy (3 years), Family counseling (1 year)

therapy_history: Speech-Language Therapy (4 years)

support_need: Moderate daily transition and lifestyle skill development
therapy_history: Occupational Therapy (4 years), Social Skills (3 years)

support_need: Low support; physical sleep schedule management

recommended_services: School Nurse collaboration, Resource teacher consult (30 min/month)
notes: Goals address Category 1 (Adaptive/Independent Living - Understanding physical boundaries and self-advocating for fatigue) and Category 3 (ELA - Summarizing critical informational details).

support_need: High sensory and physical motor support

therapy_history: None

recommended_services: Special Education Math Resource (90 min/week)
